prompt: What's the difference between MERGE and OVERWRITE mode in the Namecheap Terraform provider? When should I use each one?

assertions.name: explains_merge_mode
assertions.check: Explains that MERGE preserves existing records and allows multiple configs

assertions.name: explains_overwrite_mode
assertions.check: Explains that OVERWRITE owns all records and removes undefined ones

assertions.name: provides_use_cases
assertions.description: Answer provides guidance on when to use each mode
assertions.check: Recommends MERGE for gradual adoption and OVERWRITE for full control

assertions.name: mentions_warning
assertions.description: Answer warns about OVERWRITE removing records
assertions.check: Warns that OVERWRITE deletes manually created records
